headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Molson Coors Beverage, Lowers Price Target to $43
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Chris Carey   maintains Molson Coors Beverage (NYSE:TAP) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $45 to $43.
